Operation 'palletPack' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Current description is too vague and relies on comparison to another operation rather than explaining the operation independently. Missing details about inputs (items, pallet specs), outputs (3D coordinates, visualization), and optimization modes. Improved description provides concrete details about what the operation accepts, calculates, and returns, enabling AI agents to understand when and how to use it.

data.current_description: Optimize pallet stacking for transport and storage. Similar to packIntoMany but designed for pallet-based workflows.
data.description_suggestion: Optimize pallet stacking for transport and storage workflows. Accepts items and pallet specifications, then calculates optimal 3D placement to maximize utilization while respecting weight constraints and item grouping rules. Returns packed pallet layouts with 3D coordinates for each item and optional visualization output. Supports multiple optimization modes similar to packIntoMany.
data.reasoning: Current description is too vague and relies on comparison to another operation rather than explaining the operation independently. Missing details about inputs (items, pallet specs), outputs (3D coordinates, visualization), and optimization modes. Improved description provides concrete details about what the operation accepts, calculates, and returns, enabling AI agents to understand when and how to use it.

message: Operation 'findSmallestBin' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Summary 'Find missing container dimension' is vague and doesn't indicate the action clearly. Improved summary specifies the calculation purpose. Description is mostly clear but lacks context about use cases and return value. Enhanced description explains the practical scenario (two dimensions fixed, one unknown) and clarifies the output, improving AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Calculate an unknown container dimension (width, height, or depth) given the items to pack and the other known dimensions.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate unknown container dimension for items
data.description_suggestion: Calculate a missing container dimension (width, height, or depth) required to pack specified items, given the other two known dimensions. Useful for determining the minimum depth, height, or width needed when two dimensions are fixed. Returns the calculated dimension value.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Find missing container dimension' is vague and doesn't indicate the action clearly. Improved summary specifies the calculation purpose. Description is mostly clear but lacks context about use cases and return value. Enhanced description explains the practical scenario (two dimensions fixed, one unknown) and clarifies the output, improving AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'findBinSize' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary 'Find optimal box size' is somewhat vague about what 'optimal' means. Improved summary clarifies it calculates dimensions. Description explains the input (items only) but lacks clarity on output format and what 'optimal' means. Enhanced description specifies the return value (minimum dimensions) and clarifies the optimization goal, helping AI agents understand the operation's purpose and output.

data.current_description: Calculate optimal container dimensions from items alone, without providing any container specification.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate optimal container dimensions for items
data.description_suggestion: Calculate optimal container dimensions (width, height, depth) required to pack all specified items efficiently, without requiring any pre-defined container specification. Returns the minimum recommended dimensions that accommodate all items with optimal space utilization.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Find optimal box size' is somewhat vague about what 'optimal' means. Improved summary clarifies it calculates dimensions. Description explains the input (items only) but lacks clarity on output format and what 'optimal' means. Enhanced description specifies the return value (minimum dimensions) and clarifies the optimization goal, helping AI agents understand the operation's purpose and output.

message: Operation 'tryOutBoxSizes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity. Enhanced description clarifies the input structure, output format, and use case (comparing multiple options), making it clear to AI agents when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Test multiple box size configurations to find optimal packing arrangements.
data.description_suggestion: Test multiple box size configurations to evaluate packing efficiency and find the optimal arrangement. Accepts items and a list of candidate container dimensions, then calculates packing results for each configuration. Returns packing outcomes for all tested sizes, including utilization metrics and 3D item placements, enabling comparison to select the best option.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity. Missing details about inputs (items and candidate dimensions list), outputs (packing results for each configuration, utilization metrics), and the comparison purpose. Enhanced description clarifies the input structure, output format, and use case (comparing multiple options), making it clear to AI agents when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'checkMaxLoad' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Summary is acceptable but description is vague about what 'check and validate' means in practice. Missing critical details: what inputs are required (packing config, weight limits), what validation is performed (per-container limits), and what output is returned (pass/fail, violations). Enhanced description clarifies the validation logic, inputs, and outputs, making it actionable for AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Check and validate maximum weight constraints for packing configurations.
data.description_suggestion: Validate whether a packing configuration respects maximum weight constraints for containers and items. Accepts a packing configuration with items and their weights, plus container weight limits, then verifies that no container exceeds its maximum load capacity. Returns validation results indicating whether constraints are satisfied and identifies any violations with affected containers and items.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is vague about what 'check and validate' means in practice. Missing critical details: what inputs are required (packing config, weight limits), what validation is performed (per-container limits), and what output is returned (pass/fail, violations).
